name: Muhammad Abdul Ahad Hashmi
title: AI & Python Developer
summary: Aspiring AI Developer and BSIT graduate with strong foundations in Python, Machine Learning, and Web Development (Flask/Django). Experienced in building predictive models using XGBoost with 91% accuracy and integrating LLM APIs (DeepSeek). Proven ability to develop scalable web solutions including a heart disease risk prediction system and sentiment analysis platform with 88% accuracy. Backed by professional internship experience in software development at Moboroid.

highlights: Collaborated with development team to build and maintain mobile applications using Java and XML
Optimized application logic and fixed bugs, reducing app crashes by ~30%
Hands-on experience with Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and API integration in professional Agile environment
Developing AI solutions under national tech export program
Working on real-world AI integration projects

flagship_project.name: Riskbeat - Heart Disease Risk Prediction System
flagship_project.description: Developed an AI-powered healthcare prediction module using XGBoost achieving 91% validation accuracy for patient risk classification. Engineered a full-stack solution using Flask to serve the model to end-users in real-time. Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for patients, doctors, and admins with advanced data preprocessing including handling missing values, normalization, and categorical encoding.

other_projects.name: Talken AI Chatbot
other_projects.description: Built a conversational AI agent using Flask and DeepSeek API for real-time natural language processing with secure session management to maintain conversation context. Deployed on cloud platforms with secure environment configuration for API keys.

other_projects.name: IMDb & Twitter Sentiment Analysis
other_projects.description: Built end-to-end sentiment analysis model for positive/negative text classification using NLP techniques. Applied text preprocessing (cleaning, tokenization, stopword removal, lemmatization) and TF-IDF vectorization. Trained Logistic Regression and Naive Bayes models achieving 88% accuracy. Deployed Streamlit web app for real-time sentiment prediction.

other_projects.name: Software Piracy Protection System
other_projects.description: Co-developed Python-based desktop application focusing on file encryption, packing, and license key validation. Designed user-friendly GUI to manage software registration and decryption processes.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT)

certifications: Artificial Intelligence Journey: Beginner to Pro
Hands On Python Data Science - Data Science Bootcamp
tone: professional but approachable, confident without being arrogant, results-focused
